idea-plugin.name: Claude Code
idea-plugin.description:
Brings the full Claude Code AI coding assistant directly into JetBrains Rider, reusing the official VS Code extension's React UI via JCEF.

Features

  • Embedded chat UI — the complete Claude Code interface runs inside a native Rider tool window, no browser required
  • Full conversation management — create, resume, and delete past sessions stored in ~/.claude/projects/
  • IDE theme adaptation — reads the IDE color palette and editor font at startup; recolors automatically when you switch themes
  • Live status icon — tool window icon shows idle / pending (blue dot) / done (orange dot) as Claude works
  • Editor context integration — passes selected text, file path, line range, and language to Claude; Claude can navigate you to a file/line in return
  • Git awareness — reports the current git branch to Claude for every session
  • Persistent settings — permission mode, model, thinking level, and custom environment variables survive IDE restarts

Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Ctrl+Escape — focus the Claude tool window
  • Ctrl+Shift+Escape — start a new conversation

Requirements

  • JetBrains Rider 2022.2 or newer
  • Claude CLI (claude) on your PATH, or configured under Settings → Tools → Claude Code

Settings

Open Settings → Tools → Claude Code to configure the Claude executable path (with a file-browser button and a Test Connection button), initial permission mode, Ctrl+Enter send behavior, and extra environment variables.

action.description: Open or focus the Claude Code tool window
Start a new conversation in Claude Code

group.description: Send selected code to Claude Code
